members.name: _GetAllowedSizeFlagsHorizontal
members.summary: Implement to return a list of allowed horizontal [enum Control.SizeFlags] for child nodes. This doesn't technically prevent the usages of any other size flags, if your implementation requires that. This only limits the options available to the user in the Inspector dock. [b]Note:[/b] Having no size flags is equal to having [constant Control.SIZE_SHRINK_BEGIN]. As such, this value is always implicitly allowed.

members.name: _GetAllowedSizeFlagsVertical
members.summary: Implement to return a list of allowed vertical [enum Control.SizeFlags] for child nodes. This doesn't technically prevent the usages of any other size flags, if your implementation requires that. This only limits the options available to the user in the Inspector dock. [b]Note:[/b] Having no size flags is equal to having [constant Control.SIZE_SHRINK_BEGIN]. As such, this value is always implicitly allowed.

members.name: FitChildInRect
members.signature: public void FitChildInRect(Control child, Rect2 rect)
members.summary: Fit a child control in a given rect. This is mainly a helper for creating custom container classes.

members.name: QueueSort
members.summary: Queue resort of the contained children. This is called automatically anyway, but can be called upon request.

members.name: AccessibilityRegion
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], this container is marked as a region for accessibility. Use [member Control.accessibility_name] to give the region a descriptive name. Screen readers can navigate between regions using landmark navigation.

signals.name: PreSortChildren
signals.summary: Emitted when children are going to be sorted.

signals.name: SortChildren
signals.summary: Emitted when sorting the children is needed.

constants.name: NOTIFICATION_PRE_SORT_CHILDREN
constants.summary: Notification just before children are going to be sorted, in case there's something to process beforehand.

constants.name: NOTIFICATION_SORT_CHILDREN
constants.summary: Notification for when sorting the children, it must be obeyed immediately.
